name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-mgobe

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-mgobe
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Mgobe SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Mgobe SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-mgobe
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common mgobe
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.mgobe_client.MgobeClient.DescribePlayer
documentation:
此接口无法使用，游戏联机对战引擎MGOBE已于6.1正式下架，感谢您的支持

该接口用于查询玩家信息。支持两种用法，当OpenId不传的时候，PlayerId必传，传入PlayerId可以查询当前PlayerId的玩家信息，当OpenId传入的时候，PlayerId可不传，按照OpenId查询玩家信息。

```
param request

Request instance for DescribePlayer.

type request



rtype

```

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.mgobe_client.MgobeClient.DescribeRoom
documentation:
此接口无法使用，游戏联机对战引擎MGOBE已于6.1正式下架，感谢您的支持

该接口用于查询房间信息。支持两种用法，当房间Id不传的时候，玩家Id必传，传入玩家Id可以查询当前玩家所在的房间信息，当房间Id传入的时候，玩家Id可不传，按照房间Id查询房间信息。

```
param request

Request instance for DescribeRoom.

type request



rtype

```

param _CreateType: "\u8868\u793A\u521B\u5EFA\u65B9\u5F0F\uFF1A0.\u5355\u4EBA\u4E3B\
  \u52A8\u53D1\u8D77\u521B\u5EFA\u623F\u95F4\u8BF7\u6C42\uFF1B1.\u591A\u4EBA\u5728\
  \u7EBF\u5339\u914D\u8BF7\u6C42\u5206\u914D\u623F\u95F4\uFF1B2. \u76F4\u63A5\u521B\
  \u5EFA\u6EE1\u5458\u623F\u95F4\u3002\u8C03\u7528\u4E91API\u7684\u521B\u623F\u8BF7\
  \u6C42\u9ED8\u8BA4\u4E3A3\uFF0C\u76EE\u524D\u901A\u8FC7\u4E91API\u8C03\u7528\u53EA\
  \u652F\u6301\u7B2C3\u79CD\u65B9\u5F0F\u3002"
param _CustomProperties: "\u8868\u793A\u81EA\u5B9A\u4E49\u623F\u95F4\u5C5E\u6027\uFF0C\
  \u4E0D\u4F20\u4E3A\u7A7A\u5B57\u7B26\u4E32\u3002\u6700\u957F\u4E0D\u8D85\u8FC71024\u4E2A\
  \u5B57\u7B26\u3002"
param _FrameRate: "\u8868\u793A\u5E27\u7387\u3002\u7531\u63A7\u5236\u53F0\u8BBE\u7F6E\
  \uFF0C\u7528\u4E8E\u51FA\u53C2\u3002"
param _FrameSyncState: "\u8868\u793A\u623F\u95F4\u5E27\u540C\u6B65\u72B6\u6001\u3002\
  0\u8868\u793A\u672A\u5F00\u59CB\u5E27\u540C\u6B65\uFF0C1\u8868\u793A\u5DF2\u5F00\
  \u59CB\u5E27\u540C\u6B65\uFF0C\u7528\u4E8E\u51FA\u53C2\u3002"
param _Id: "\u8868\u793A\u623F\u95F4 ID\u3002\u51FA\u53C2\u7528\uFF0C\u7531\u540E\u7AEF\
  \u8FD4\u56DE\u3002"
param _IsForbidJoin: "\u8868\u793A\u662F\u5426\u7981\u6B62\u52A0\u5165\u623F\u95F4\
  \u3002\u51FA\u53C2\u4F7F\u7528\uFF0C\u9ED8\u8BA4\u4E3AFalse\uFF0C\u901A\u8FC7SDK\u7684\
  ChangeRoom\u63A5\u53E3\u53EF\u4EE5\u4FEE\u6539\u3002"
param _IsPrivate: "\u8868\u793A\u662F\u5426\u79C1\u6709\uFF0C\u79C1\u6709\u6307\u7684\
  \u662F\u4E0D\u5141\u8BB8\u5176\u4ED6\u73A9\u5BB6\u901A\u8FC7\u5339\u914D\u52A0\u5165\
  \u623F\u95F4\u3002"
param _MaxPlayers: "\u8868\u793A\u623F\u95F4\u6700\u5927\u73A9\u5BB6\u6570\u91CF\u3002\
  \u6700\u5927\u4E0D\u8D85\u8FC7100\u4EBA\u3002"
param _Name: "\u8868\u793A\u623F\u95F4\u540D\u79F0\u3002\u6700\u957F\u4E0D\u8D85\u8FC7\
  32\u4E2A\u5B57\u7B26\u3002"
param _Owner: "\u8868\u793A\u623F\u4E3BPlayerId\u3002"
param _OwnerOpenId: "\u8868\u793A\u623F\u4E3BOpenId\u3002\u6700\u957F\u4E0D\u8D85\u8FC7\
  16\u4E2A\u5B57\u7B26\u3002"
param _Players: "\u8868\u793A\u73A9\u5BB6\u8BE6\u60C5\u5217\u8868\u3002"
param _RouteId: "\u8868\u793A\u8DEF\u7531ID\u3002\u7528\u4E8E\u51FA\u53C2\u3002"
param _StartGameTime: "\u8868\u793A\u5F00\u59CB\u5E27\u540C\u6B65\u65F6\u7684\u65F6\
  \u95F4\u6233\uFF08\u5355\u4F4D\uFF1A\u79D2\uFF09,\u672A\u5F00\u59CB\u5E27\u540C\u6B65\
  \u65F6\u8FD4\u56DE\u4E3A0\u3002"
param _Teams: "\u8868\u793A\u56E2\u961F\u5C5E\u6027\u5217\u8868\u3002"
param _Type: "\u8868\u793A\u623F\u95F4\u7C7B\u578B\u3002\u6700\u957F\u4E0D\u8D85\u8FC7\
  32\u4E2A\u5B57\u7B26\u3002"
type CreateTime: int
type CreateType: int
type CustomProperties: str
type FrameRate: int
type FrameSyncState: int
type Id: str
type IsForbidJoin: bool
type IsPrivate: bool
type MaxPlayers: int
type Name: str
type Owner: str
type OwnerOpenId: str
type Players: list of Player
type RouteId: str
type StartGameTime: int
type Teams: list of Team
type Type: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.Name
documentation:
表示房间名称。最长不超过32个字符。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.MaxPlayers
documentation:
表示房间最大玩家数量。最大不超过100人。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.OwnerOpenId
documentation:
表示房主OpenId。最长不超过16个字符。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.IsPrivate
documentation:
表示是否私有，私有指的是不允许其他玩家通过匹配加入房间。
\:rtype: bool

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.Players
documentation:
表示玩家详情列表。
\:rtype: list of Player

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.Teams
documentation:
表示团队属性列表。
\:rtype: list of Team

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.Id
documentation:
表示房间 ID。出参用，由后端返回。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.Type
documentation:
表示房间类型。最长不超过32个字符。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.CreateType
documentation:
表示创建方式：0.单人主动发起创建房间请求；1.多人在线匹配请求分配房间；2. 直接创建满员房间。调用云API的创房请求默认为3，目前通过云API调用只支持第3种方式。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.CustomProperties
documentation:
表示自定义房间属性，不传为空字符串。最长不超过1024个字符。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.FrameSyncState
documentation:
表示房间帧同步状态。0表示未开始帧同步，1表示已开始帧同步，用于出参。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.FrameRate
documentation:
表示帧率。由控制台设置，用于出参。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.RouteId
documentation:
表示路由ID。用于出参。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.CreateTime
documentation:
表示房间创建的时间戳（单位：秒）。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.StartGameTime
documentation:
表示开始帧同步时的时间戳（单位：秒）,未开始帧同步时返回为0。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.IsForbidJoin
documentation:
表示是否禁止加入房间。出参使用，默认为False，通过SDK的ChangeRoom接口可以修改。
\:rtype: bool

methods.name: tencentcloud.mgobe.v20201014.models.Room.Owner
documentation:
表示房主PlayerId。
\:rtype: str
房间信息详情。
